Patch Set 4:

right you are.  i had that in there at one point and must have lost it in the shuffle.

Patch Set 2:

Test abandoned because later commit 11939 found

Patch Set 4: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Yes more patches to the ldiskfs layer is coming. This is a good start. I like to move to making these patches work more with the core rhel6 patches. The reason for this is two fold. First fixes always go to rhel6. If we share as many patches as possible then we win a fix goes in. The other reason is the patches to inspect means a fast turn around time for merger which the window is fast approaching.

Patch Set 11: (5 inline comments)

I'll update the patches as mentioned and incorporate the changes into the RHEL patchset before this patchset is applied so that we end up with matching patches.

Patch Set 12:

Jeff also I moved to a 3.0.61 kernel and it appears ext4 no longer has s_qf_inums for quotas.

Patch Set 12:

Its in another patch for ext4 -> ldiskfs that for some reason didn't apply.

Patch Set 13:

Patch Set 19: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

(9 inline comments)

There are a number of cosmetic issues that could be fixed if this patch is refreshed...

However, I see there are a number of other patches following this one to clean up the patch series, so I'd be OK with addressing these fixes in a later patch in this series, since they are generally also issues in the original RHEL6 patches and we may as well fix them in both places at once.
Uploaded patch set 20.

Patch Set 21: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

There is no difference between 20 and 21 except that I forgot to remove ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/sles11sp2/ext4-avoid-uninitialized-memory-references-in-ext3_htree_next_block.patch from Patchset 20.

The differences between 19 and 20 implement the inline comments left for Patchset 19 by Andreas and I.

parents.subject: LU-2473 ldiskfs: Reorganize ldiskfs kernel patches

commit.subject: LU-1812 ldiskfs: Add kernel patch series for SLES11SP2
commit.message:
LU-1812 ldiskfs: Add kernel patch series for SLES11SP2

Add a kernel patch series for SLES11SP2.

Signed-off-by: James Simmons - <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Signed-off-by: chas williams - CONTRACTOR <chas@cmf.nrl.navy.mil>
Signed-off-by: Jeff Mahoney <jeffm@suse.com>
Change-Id: I5e3902eb90e69c9652cdfbfc0d8ea1d99d15b453
